reference: My five-year-old has told me several times over the last several days that he feels dizzy and his tummy hurts. He does have a little cold, but nothing major. There doesn't seem to be a pattern as to when he tells me he's dizzy - he says his head is dizzy and his tummy is dizzy. Should I bring him to the doctor?
